UpdateHighlyAvailableVirtualIp.haVipId: The ID of the highly available virtual IP
UpdateHighlyAvailableVirtualIp.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of no more than 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency Support](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
UpdateHighlyAvailableVirtualIp.name: The name of the highly available virtual IP
UpdateHighlyAvailableVirtualIp.description: The description of the highly available virtual IP
